sect1.title: molecules of pool on previous timestep

briefdescription.para: Integer conversion of Id of pool handled.
Number of molecules of pool in each voxel.

detaileddescription.para: Default is to create it with a single compartment, independent of any solver, so that we can set it up as a dummy DiffPool for the Pool to work on in single-compartment models.

briefdescription.para: Used by parent solver to manipulate 'n'.
Used by parent solver to manipulate 'n'.

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int start, unsigned int num, vector< double >::const_iterator q)
memberdef.name: setNvec

memberdef.argsstring: (const vector< Triplet< double > > &ops_, const vector< double > &diagVal_)
memberdef.name: setOps

detaileddescription.para: This is a FieldElement of the Dsolve class. It manages (ie., zombifies) a specific pool, and the pool maintains a pointer to it. For accessing volumes, this maintains a pointer to the relevant ChemCompt.
